The mention of warrantless phone checks and the hashtag #SecurityOverreach reinforced my skepticism about overreach, though my baseline support was already moderate.

request_payload.exposure_text: Just saw this at the airport - security was checking phones without warrants. They said it's for 'national preparedness,' but where does this end? We can't let fear justify losing our freedoms. #SecurityOverreach #KnowYourRights
